title: Top Notch Farmer
overview: All Al wants to do is live a tranquil existence as a farmer. Unfortunately for him, unwittingly rescuing the princess means his life is about to become far more complicated.

title: The Farmer and The Guild
overview: It was supposed to be a simple gathering quest, but Al’s discovery of a black dragon scale becomes an omen of things to come.

title: The Farmer and The Malevolent Dragon Ouroborus
overview: Al encounters the ghost of Helen’s brother, who begs him to save his sister from Ouroboros.

title: The Farmer and the Life That Was Saved
overview: Ouroboros won’t go down that easily; the battle for Helen’s soul has only just begun.

title: The Farmer and Lulugus
overview: A fellow adventurer joins Al on his way to Lurugus.

title: The Farmer and The Hero Who Can't Be a Hero
overview: Loki will stop at nothing to ensure the Hero’s bloodline ends with Ruri!

title: The Farmer and The Princess's Resolution
overview: Heavy is the head that wears the crown; Fal must accept a political marriage for the sake of the kingdom.

title: The Farmer and The Wedding
overview: Al, Helen, and Ruri must expose Nedilus’ evil deeds and thwart his plan! However, everything depends on rescuing a hostage imprisoned in the castle first.

title: Al's Past
overview: Al had another childhood friend other than Testa, and her name was Ilvia. Al will always remember her.

title: The Farmer and Aspara Town
overview: Linea knows something is wrong in Gull Town and wants the guild to investigate.

title: The Reunion of The Farmer and The Demon King's Castle
overview: Al gets more than he bargains for when he rescues a young girl from her assailants; she’s the daughter of the Demon King, and she needs Al’s help to save demon kind!

title: The Farmer and The New Resolution
overview: Al’s mind reels from a shocking revelation! He has many questions, but he will only receive the answers if he accepts a dark bargain.
